original_prompt: Your task is to post hobbies of the company employees to our website www.our-company.com.They sent their hobbies to Bob via direct Slack message so you can find the info in his inbox.
assessment_reasoning: The prompt gives a clear high-level goal (post employees' hobbies to www.our-company.com) and the data source (Bob's direct Slack messages), so the agent knows where to look and where to post. However, it omits several important execution details: it does not specify the exact content/format for the website post, how to locate the relevant message(s) in Bob’s inbox, any authentication or endpoint details for posting, or whether any filtering/aggregation of multiple employees is required. It also doesn’t state the exact hobbies (they must be extracted from Slack). Given that some key operational details are missing but the overall task, source, and destination are provided, the prompt is moderately ambiguous.

variations.L1: Post the employees' hobbies to the company website. They sent them to Bob via direct Slack messages — find them in his inbox and put them on the site.
variations.L2: Take the hobbies the employees sent to Bob by direct Slack message, find those messages in Bob's inbox, and post the hobbies to our company website (www.our-company.com). Summarize them on the site.
variations.L3: Your task: post the employees' hobbies to our website (www.our-company.com). The employees sent their hobbies to Bob via direct Slack messages, so look in Bob's inbox to find the hobby list. Then publish a short summary of those hobbies on the company site.
variations.L4: Read Bob's Slack direct messages to find the list of employees' hobbies, then publish them on our company website (www.our-company.com). Post a single-sentence summary in the format “hobbies are ...” listing the hobbies separated by commas (use lowercase and commas between items).
variations.L5: Step-by-step: 1) Call read_inbox with user='Bob' and locate the direct messages containing the employees' hobbies. 2) Extract the hobby items from Bob's messages. 3) Call post_webpage with url='www.our-company.com' and content set exactly to a single sentence in this format: "hobbies are hiking, swimming and painting" (all lowercase, comma-separated). Return success after the webpage is posted.
